title: Canonical task surface refactor for project detail
summary: Refactors the project task surface around a canonical workflow config, normalized task records, React Query cache ownership, a shared task panel resource layer, schema-backed task editor drafts, a persisted-signals-only activity feed, and a new threaded task discussion system with presence-based typing while removing misleading create-task and task-board affordances.
concurrencyRisk: Moderate client-cache and realtime coordination risk across board/list/detail/task-resource paths; mitigated by canonical task normalization, targeted React Query cache patching, single task-resource subscriptions per open panel, bounded fallback refreshes, and rollback snapshots for task mutations.

rollback.strategy: Revert the task-surface module set together: canonical task workflow/draft/cache helpers, threaded discussion actions and reducer hooks, the task panel resource layer, and the task tabs. Do not keep a mixed panel/resource implementation in place.
validation: npx tsx --test tests/unit/task-validation.test.ts tests/unit/task-workflow.test.ts tests/unit/task-draft.test.ts tests/unit/task-cache.test.ts tests/unit/task-activity.test.ts tests/unit/task-discussion.test.ts

commands: npx tsx --test tests/unit/task-validation.test.ts tests/unit/task-workflow.test.ts tests/unit/task-draft.test.ts tests/unit/task-cache.test.ts tests/unit/task-activity.test.ts tests/unit/task-discussion.test.ts
